blended.narrative: Grand Targhee is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 7,496 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions. Models disagree — check back.
